home.bio: I'm a <1>Backend Developer</1> specialized in building secure, efficient, and scalable web systems. Proficient in <3>Laravel</3>, <5>PHP</5>, and <7>MySQL</7>, with a strong foundation in software developer from SMK Wikrama Bogor.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A brief introduction to who I am and my professional journey.
about.intro_text_1: I'm <1>Muhammad Delvin Julian</1>, a software developer dedicated to building impactful digital solutions. I specialize in <3>Backend Development</3> using Laravel, PHP, and MySQL, with a strong foundation in MVC architecture and RESTful API design.
about.intro_text_2: Currently, I'm an undergraduate student at <1>SMK Wikrama Bogor</1>, driven by logic and performance optimizations.

career_items.summary: Responsible for building backend logic and database management for internal company systems to improve operational efficiency.

details.title: Project Management System Development
details.desc: Designed database and application logic for project management and employee task tracking features.

details.title: Admin Dashboard Integration
details.desc: Developed an interactive dashboard system displaying data charts, statistics, and company performance calculations automatically.

details.title: Inventory & Event Management
details.desc: Built system modules for company asset management and internal event planning.

details.title: Real-Time Communication Features
details.desc: Implemented internal chat systems to facilitate communication between users within the application.

details.title: Database Design (ERD)
details.desc: Created efficient Entity Relationship Diagrams (ERD) and managed MySQL database structures to ensure data integrity.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: My personal portfolio website — a premium, interactive experience built with modern frontend technologies.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.tagline: A premium developer portfolio with smooth animations, dark theme, and interactive UI components.
portfolio.description: A fully custom personal portfolio website designed and developed from scratch. Built with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, and Framer Motion to create a premium, fast, and visually stunning experience. The site features a floating sidebar layout, GSAP-powered entrance animations, interactive 3D skill icons with spring physics, shared element transitions on the Projects page, a real-time analytics dashboard powered by Umami, and full internationalization support for English and Indonesian.
portfolio.role: Frontend Developer & Designer — Responsible for the complete design and development of this portfolio. Currently in the design and development phase, continuously iterating on the UI/UX to achieve a world-class aesthetic. Handling everything from the component architecture, animation choreography, responsive layouts, to the integration of third-party services like Umami Analytics.
features: Smooth page transitions with Framer Motion shared element animations
GSAP-powered cascading entrance animations on the homepage
Interactive 3D skill icon grid with spring physics and hover effects
Floating sidebar layout with responsive mobile navigation
Dark mode design with glassmorphism and gradient orb backgrounds
Real-time analytics dashboard with Recharts and Umami API integration
SpotlightCard hover effect with mouse-following radial glow
Deployed on Vercel with instant global CDN

dashboard.title: Site Analytics
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time traffic, page views, and visitor interactions across the entire portfolio — powered by privacy-first analytics.
dashboard.powered_by: Analytics powered by Umami — privacy-first, open-source web analytics.
dashboard.chart_subtitle: Daily sessions and pageviews over the last 30 days
